content: Most existing explorations of Self-Refine treat it as a general-purpose iterative improvement pipeline, but integrating multiple-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms can solve its key flaw of getting stuck in local optimization loops caused by single-perspective self-feedback. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional training or supervised data, while breaking out of homogeneous feedback bias by pulling in inconsistent solving perspectives from self-reflection mechanism research.
